landing.quranic_translation: Take from their wealth a charity by which you purify them
landing.subheading: Hisaably walks you through your Zakat step by step. Every category explained. Every number justified. No doubt left behind.
landing.social_proof: Built by Muslims, for Muslims · Used across 20+ countries
landing.step1_desc: Cash, gold, crypto, investments — we guide you through each one with the Islamic ruling explained.
landing.step2_desc: Live gold, silver and crypto prices. Your exact Zakat amount calculated using the nisab threshold.
landing.step3_desc: Full breakdown, personalized AI summary, and unlimited questions. Leave with zero doubt.
landing.feature_1: Explains every asset category in plain language
landing.feature_2: Uses live market prices — no outdated estimates
landing.feature_3: Calculates using silver and gold nisab
landing.feature_4: Answers unlimited follow-up questions on your result
landing.feature_5: Reminds you what to do next and who to give to

auth.login_subtitle: Log in to view your Zakat calculation
auth.signup_subtitle: Create a free account to get started

flow.title: Let's calculate your Zakat
flow.subtitle: This takes about 5 minutes. We'll walk through each asset category step by step.
flow.currency_question: What currency are your assets in?
flow.nisab_question: Which nisab threshold would you like to use?
flow.silver_desc: 612g of silver (~$350) — most scholars recommend this
flow.both_desc: Calculate using gold and silver nisab

steps.cash_hint: Include all savings, current accounts, and cash on hand.
steps.gold_jewelry: This is worn jewelry (typically excluded from Zakat)
steps.investments_label: Total value of stocks, ETFs, mutual funds (USD)
steps.investments_hint: Use current market value. If you own stocks through an employer plan, include the vested amount.
steps.receivables_label: Money owed to you that you expect to receive (USD)
steps.receivables_hint: Include loans you've given, unpaid wages, or other receivables likely to be repaid.
steps.debts_hint: Include credit cards, personal loans due within the year. Mortgages and long-term debts: scholars differ — consult your scholar.

review.title: Your Zakat Summary
review.subtitle: Review your inputs before unlocking your result.
review.unlock_desc: Breakdown by category · AI explanations · Exportable report
review.cancel_note: Cancel anytime · Billed annually · Instant access

results.hawl_title: One quick question before your result
results.hawl_desc: Zakat is only obligatory on wealth that has been in your possession for a full lunar year (hawl).
results.hawl_sub: This helps ensure your calculation is accurate.
results.hawl_yes: Yes — I've held this wealth for a full lunar year
results.hawl_no: No — I haven't held it for a full year
results.hawl_no_desc: Based on your answer, your hawl (lunar year) hasn't been completed yet. Zakat is not obligatory on you at this time.
results.hawl_no_advice: Mark your Zakat date on your calendar for the lunar year from when you first reached nisab. Many Muslims use the start of Ramadan as a consistent date.
results.below_nisab_title: You are below the nisab threshold
results.below_nisab_desc: Your zakatable wealth does not meet the nisab threshold. Zakat is not obligatory this year.
results.below_nisab_encourage: Consider giving voluntary sadaqah if you are able.
results.next_1: Pay your Zakat to eligible recipients — the poor, the needy, those in debt, and others listed in Surah At-Tawbah 9:60.
results.next_2: Consider local mosques, Islamic relief organizations, or individuals in your community.
results.next_3: You may pay Zakat in cash, or its equivalent value in goods or services.
results.next_4: Mark your Zakat date (hawl completion) for next year.
results.disclaimer: This report is for personal reference only. Consult a qualified scholar for your specific situation. Hisaably does not issue fatwas.
results.debt_note_desc: You've entered a significant debt amount. Scholars differ on how much debt can be deducted. This calculation uses the short-term debt deduction approach. If you have long-term debts like a mortgage, consult a scholar for a ruling specific to your madhab.
results.ask_subtitle: Have a question about your result? Ask anything.

ai.ask_placeholder: e.g. Does Zakat apply to my pension?

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
